Start Learning Interactive Tools
Learning Mode:
8.1B Radio Link Monitoring

RLM for RedCap

Radio Link Monitoring ensures RedCap devices maintain reliable connection by detecting out-of-sync and in-sync conditions with relaxed thresholds compared to full-capability NR.

BLER Thresholds

Out-of-Sync (Qout) 10%

BLER threshold for declaring radio link failure. Higher than full-NR's 10% due to relaxed requirements.

In-Sync (Qin) 2%

BLER threshold for recovering sync. Same as full-NR, maintaining recovery reliability.

Signal Degradation Simulator

SNR: 0 dB
BLER: 0%
Qout (10% BLER)
Qin (2% BLER)
Adjust slider to simulate signal changes

1Rx vs 2Rx Comparison

Parameter 1Rx (Single Antenna) 2Rx (Dual Antenna) Impact
Aggregation Level (Out-of-Sync) 16 CCE 8 CCE 2x relaxed
Bandwidth (Out-of-Sync) 48 PRBs 24 PRBs 2x relaxed
TEvaluate (Out-of-Sync, FR1) Max(400, Ceil(20×P)×TSSB) Max(200, Ceil(10×P)×TSSB) 2x longer
CSI-RS Mout 40 20 2x relaxed
RSRP Accuracy (FR1 Normal) ±7 dB ±5.5 dB 27% worse
9.1A Measurement Procedure

Measurement Gaps & CSSF

RedCap uses measurement gaps to monitor neighboring cells while maintaining power efficiency. The Carrier-Specific Scaling Factor (CSSF) adapts measurement timing based on network conditions.

Measurement Gap Patterns

Gap Pattern 0 Visualization Duty Cycle: 15%
Active
GAP
Active
GAP
Active
0ms 20ms 40ms 60ms 80ms

CSSF Calculator

Ri = 0.5
CSSFwithin_gap
1.5

Formula: 1 / (1 - Mtot × Ri)

Mtot = Mintra + Minter = 3

4.2B Idle Mobility

Cell Reselection for RedCap

RedCap devices use relaxed cell reselection timers to save power while maintaining mobility. The Nserv_RedCap parameter scales with DRX cycle, eDRX, and PTW configuration.

Nserv_RedCap Calculator

Nserv_RedCap
4 DRX cycles
Formula: N1 × 4 (No eDRX)

Cell Reselection Timeline

Tdetect
Detect neighbor cells
600ms
Tmeasure
Measure signal strength
200ms
Tevaluate
Evaluate for reselection
1s
10.1A Performance Requirements

Measurement Accuracy

RedCap has relaxed accuracy requirements compared to full-capability NR, especially for 1Rx devices. The accuracy depends on Io (interference level) and frequency range.

RSRP Absolute Accuracy (FR1)

1Rx
2Rx
Io > -80dBm
±7 dB
±5.5 dB
-80 to -90
±9 dB
±7.5 dB
-90 to -100
±11 dB
±11 dB
Condition Io Range 1Rx Accuracy 2Rx Accuracy Difference
Normal Io ≥ -80 dBm ±7 dB ±5.5 dB +27%
Normal -80 > Io ≥ -90 ±9 dB ±7.5 dB +20%
Normal -90 > Io ≥ -100 ±11 dB ±11 dB Same
Extreme Io ≥ -80 dBm ±10 dB ±8.5 dB +18%

Interactive Tools

Explore RedCap concepts with live calculators and simulators.

P-Factor Calculator

Calculate the gap scaling factor P for FR1 and FR2.

P = 1.14

TEvaluate Calculator

Calculate RLM evaluation period for out-of-sync detection.

TEvaluate = 200 ms

1Rx vs 2Rx Dashboard

Compare all parameters between single and dual antenna configurations.

16
1Rx CCE
8
2Rx CCE

Gap Sharing Simulator

Simulate intra/inter-frequency gap sharing with K factors.

Kintra = 2.0, Kinter = 2.0

The Beauty of RedCap RRM

Why RedCap's Radio Resource Management is elegantly designed for the Internet of Things.

Power Efficiency First

RedCap's relaxed timers and 1Rx support can extend battery life by 2-3x compared to full-capability NR, making it perfect for IoT sensors.

The Elegance of Relaxation

By doubling evaluation periods and reducing accuracy requirements, RedCap achieves massive power savings with minimal impact on user experience.

Intelligent Adaptation

CSSF dynamically adjusts measurement timing based on network load, ensuring optimal balance between accuracy and efficiency.

A Deliberate Trade-off

The 1Rx vs 2Rx choice isn't a limitation—it's a feature. Choose power savings (1Rx) or performance (2Rx) based on your use case.

Designed for IoT

Every aspect of RedCap RRM—from relaxed BLER thresholds to flexible gap patterns—is optimized for low-power, low-complexity devices.

Future Ready

RedCap bridges the gap between LTE-M/NB-IoT and full 5G NR, providing a clear migration path for IoT devices into the 5G era.

"RedCap is not a compromise—it's a masterclass in designing for constraints."
— 3GPP TS 38.133 Philosophy
RedCapRRM

Interactive educational resource for 5G NR Reduced Capability Radio Resource Management.
